sourcesContent:
/**
 * Mock product catalogue.
 * In a real app this would come from an API.
 */

export const ALL_PRODUCTS = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Arc Desk Lamp",
    category: "Lighting",
    price: 89,
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 312,
    badge: "Bestseller",
    emoji: "💡",
    desc: "Warm diffused light with a minimalist arm design.",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Linen Throw Pillow",
    category: "Decor",
    price: 34,
    rating: 4.5,
    reviews: 198,
    badge: "New",
    emoji: "🛋️",
    desc: "Naturally textured Belgian linen, stone-washed finish.",
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Ceramic Pour-Over",
    category: "Kitchen",
    price: 55,
    rating: 4.9,
    reviews: 540,
    badge: "Top Rated",
    emoji: "☕",
    desc: "Handcrafted matte ceramic with a built-in filter cone.",
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Oak Serving Board",
    category: "Kitchen",
    price: 72,
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 221,
    badge: null,
    emoji: "🪵",
    desc: "End-grain American white oak, food-safe oil finish.",
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Canvas Tote Bag",
    category: "Accessories",
    price: 28,
    rating: 4.3,
    reviews: 89,
    badge: null,
    emoji: "👜",
    desc: "12oz waxed canvas with brass rivets and leather strap.",
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Brass Bookend Set",
    category: "Decor",
    price: 46,
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 167,
    badge: "Sale",
    emoji: "📚",
    desc: "Solid cast brass — polished face, raw back edge.",
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: "Merino Scarf",
    category: "Accessories",
    price: 95,
    rating: 4.9,
    reviews: 403,
    badge: "New",
    emoji: "🧣",
    desc: "Extra-fine 17.5-micron merino, naturally temperature-regulating.",
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: "Glass Carafe",
    category: "Kitchen",
    price: 38,
    rating: 4.4,
    reviews: 133,
    badge: null,
    emoji: "🫙",
    desc: "Borosilicate glass with a hand-turned walnut stopper.",
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    name: "Woven Wall Art",
    category: "Decor",
    price: 120,
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 77,
    badge: "Limited",
    emoji: "🖼️",
    desc: "Hand-loomed natural cotton and jute on a driftwood rod.",
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    name: "Leather Wallet",
    category: "Accessories",
    price: 65,
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 290,
    badge: null,
    emoji: "👛",
    desc: "Full-grain vegetable-tanned leather, 6-card slots.",
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    name: "Soy Pillar Candle",
    category: "Lighting",
    price: 22,
    rating: 4.5,
    reviews: 512,
    badge: "Bestseller",
    emoji: "🕯️",
    desc: "100% soy wax, 60-hour burn, unscented matte finish.",
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    name: "Rattan Tray",
    category: "Decor",
    price: 41,
    rating: 4.4,
    reviews: 148,
    badge: null,
    emoji: "🧺",
    desc: "Hand-woven Balinese rattan with a lacquered inner base.",
  },
];

export const CATEGORIES = [
  "All",
  ...new Set(ALL_PRODUCTS.map((p) => p.category)),
];

export const SORT_OPTIONS = [
  { value: "default", label: "Featured" },
  { value: "price-asc", label: "Price: Low → High" },
  { value: "price-desc", label: "Price: High → Low" },
  { value: "rating", label: "Top Rated" },
];

export const HOOKS_LEGEND = [
  { name: "useState", tip: "UI state (query, category, sort, cart panel)", custom: false },
  { name: "useEffect", tip: "Keyboard shortcut ⌘K, page title", custom: false },
  { name: "useContext", tip: "Cart & Theme consumed in ProductCard", custom: false },
  { name: "useReducer", tip: "Cart state machine (add/remove/qty)", custom: false },
  { name: "useCallback", tip: "Stable handleAddToCart", custom: false },
  { name: "useMemo", tip: "Filtered product list, cart total", custom: false },
  { name: "useRef", tip: "SearchInput DOM ref, panel animation", custom: false },
  { name: "useLayoutEffect", tip: "Button pulse animation, panel slide-in", custom: false },
  { name: "useImperativeHandle", tip: "Search .focus() & .clear() via ref", custom: false },
  { name: "useId", tip: "Sort & Category label IDs", custom: false },
  { name: "useTransition", tip: "Category switch (non-urgent)", custom: false },
  { name: "useDeferredValue", tip: "Deferred search query", custom: false },
  { name: "useDebugValue", tip: "Custom hooks in DevTools", custom: false },
  { name: "useLocalStorage ✦", tip: "Persist dark mode across sessions", custom: true },
  { name: "useDebounce ✦", tip: "280ms search delay", custom: true },
  { name: "useWindowSize ✦", tip: "Responsive grid columns", custom: true },
  { name: "usePrevious ✦", tip: "Cart total delta in panel", custom: true },
];
